mapper.sql: id, user_id, points, change_type, description, biz_id, biz_type, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_points_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_points_record (user_id, points, change_type, description, biz_id, biz_type, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{points}, #{changeType}, #{description}, #{bizId}, #{bizType}, NOW())
